# ILMessageFilterSubAction.promotionalOthers

**Case**

Prevents the system from showing the message normally, filtered as an Others message.

## Declaration

```swift
case promotionalOthers
```

## Promotional Subactions

- **ILMessageFilterSubAction.promotionalOffers**: Prevents the system from showing the message normally, filtered as an Offers message.
- **ILMessageFilterSubAction.promotionalCoupons**: Prevents the system from showing the message normally, filtered as an Coupons message.
